fields.title: Instant Date
fields.description: Date of instant period

fields.name: utility_type_axis
fields.title: Utility Type [Axis]
fields.description: Information categorized by the type of utility.

resources.name: retained_earnings_118_duration
resources.title: 118 - Schedule - Retained Earnings - duration

fields.name: entity_id
fields.title: Entity Identifier
fields.description: Unique identifier of respondent

fields.name: filing_name
fields.title: Filing Name
fields.description: Name of filing

fields.name: publication_time
fields.title: Publication Time
fields.description: Time the filing was made available on the FERC RSS feed.

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: Start date of report period

fields.name: end_date
fields.title: End Date
fields.description: End date of report period

fields.name: adjustments_to_retained_earnings_debit
fields.title: Adjustments to Retained Earnings Debit
fields.description:
Nonrecurring adjustments resulting in a decrease to retained earnings. Includes, with prior Commission approval, significant nonrecurring transactions accounted for as prior period adjustments, as follows:

(1) Correction of an error in the financial statements of a prior year.

(2) Adjustments that result from realization of income tax benefits of pre-acquisition operating loss carryforwards of purchased subsidiaries.

All other items of profit and loss recognized during a year shall be included in the determination of net income for that year.

fields.name: equity_in_earnings_of_subsidiary_companies_contra_primary_account_affected
fields.title: Equity in Earnings of Subsidiary Companies (Major Only), Contra Primary Account Affected
fields.description: Account number(s) of the primary account(s) that are offset when earnings in subsidiary companies are recorded (incurred).

fields.name: unappropriated_retained_earnings_contra_primary_account_affected
fields.title: Unappropriated Retained Earnings - Contra Primary Account Affected
fields.description: Account number(s) of the primary account(s) that are offset when retained earnings are initially initially earned (unappropriated yet for any particular purpose - i.e. paid as dividends; retained within operations; etc.).

fields.name: dividends_declared_common_stock
fields.title: Dividends Declared, Common Stock
fields.description:
A. This account shall include amounts declared payable out of current period retained earnings as dividends on actually outstanding common capital stock issued by the utility. 
B. Dividends shall be segregated for each class of common stock as to those payable in cash, stock and other forms. If not payable in cash, the medium of payment shall be described with sufficient detail to identify it.

fields.name: appropriated_retained_earnings_including_reserve_amortization_contra_primary_account_affected
fields.title: Appropriated Retained Earnings Including Federal Amortization Reserve, Contra Primary Account Affected
fields.description: Account number(s) of the primary account(s) that are offset when retained earnings (both current and prior period) and licensee reserves for federal purposes, are appropriated.

fields.name: transfers_from_unappropriated_undistributed_subsidiary_earnings_contra_primary_account_affected
fields.title: Transfers from Unappropriated Undistributed Subsidiary Earnings, Contra Primary Account Affected
fields.description: Account number(s) of the primary account(s) (i.e. account 216) that are offset when unappropriated subsidiary earnings are transferred to the utility.

fields.name: adjustments_to_retained_earnings_credit
fields.title: Adjustments to Retained Earnings Credit
fields.description:
Nonrecurring adjustment resulting in an increase to retained earnings. Includes, with prior Commission approval, significant nonrecurring transactions accounted for as prior period adjustments, as follows:

(1) Correction of an error in the financial statements of a prior year.

(2) Adjustments that result from realization of income tax benefits of pre-acquisition operating loss carryforwards of purchased subsidiaries.

All other items of profit and loss recognized during a year shall be included in the determination of net income for that year.

fields.name: dividends_declared_preferred_stock
fields.title: Dividends Declared, Preferred Stock
fields.description:
A. This account shall include amounts declared payable out of current period retained earnings as dividends on actually outstanding preferred or prior lien capital stock issued by the utility. 
B. Dividends shall be segregated for each class and series of preferred stock as to those payable in cash, stock, and other forms. If not payable in cash, the medium of payment shall be described with sufficient detail to identify it.

fields.name: unappropriated_undistributed_subsidiary_earnings_contra_primary_account_affected
fields.title: Unappropriated Undistributed Subsidiary Earnings (Major Only), Contra Primary Account Affected
fields.description: Account number(s) of the primary account(s) that are offset when subsidiary earnings are earned (not yet appropriated).

fields.name: dividends_received_contra_primary_account_affected
fields.title: Dividends Received, Contra Primary Account Affected
fields.description: Account number(s) of the primary account(s) that are offset (i.e. cash; other assets; etc.) when dividends are received.

fields.name: retained_earnings_primary_contra_account_affected
fields.title: Retained Earnings, Primary Contra Account Affected
fields.description: Account number(s) of the primary account(s) that are offset when retained earnings or deficit is booked.

fields.name: changes_unappropriated_undistributed_subsidiary_earnings_credits
fields.title: Changes Unappropriated Undistributed Subsidiary Earnings (Major Only) (Credits)
fields.description: Current period increases in subsidiary's earnings during the year that will not be paid out to shareholders as dividends but will be reinvested in the core business and ongoing operations.

fields.name: appropriations_of_retained_earnings
fields.title: Appropriations of Retained Earnings
fields.description:
This account shall include appropriations of current period retained earnings.

Items
1. Appropriations required under terms of mortgages, orders of courts, contracts, or other agreements.

2. Appropriations required by action of regulatory authorities.

3. Other appropriations made at option of utility for specific purposes.

fields.name: appropriated_retained_earnings_amortization_reserve_federal_contra_primary_account_affected
fields.title: Appropriated Retained Earnings, Amortization Reserve, Federal, Contra Primary Account Affected
fields.description: Account number(s) of the primary account(s) that are offset when appropriated retained earnings for amortization of  (account 215.1) is booked (recorded) for the period.

fields.name: balance_transferred_from_income
fields.title: Balance Transferred from Income
fields.description: This balance consists of the utility's net income transferred into retained earnings.  The amount of net income transferred into retained earnings is determined by the difference between the overall net income transferred to retained earnings (account 433) against the portion of net income attributable to the utility's subsidiary companies (account 418.1).

resources.name: retained_earnings_118_instant
resources.title: 118 - Schedule - Retained Earnings - instant

fields.name: appropriated_retained_earnings_amortization_reserve_federal
fields.title: Appropriated Retained Earnings, Amortization Reserve, Federal
fields.description:
A. This account shall be credited with such amounts as are appropriated by a licensee from account 216, Unappropriated Retained Earnings, for amortization reserve purposes in accordance with the requirements of a hydroelectric project license.
B. This account shall be debited with only such items or amounts as the Commission may require or approve. (See account 127, Amortization Fund—Federal.)

fields.name: appropriated_retained_earnings
fields.title: Appropriated Retained Earnings
fields.description: This account shall include the amount of all (current and prior periods) retained earnings which have been appropriated or set aside for specific purposes. Separate subaccounts shall be maintained under such titles as will designate the purpose for which each appropriation was made.

resources.name: retained_earnings_appropriated_118_duration

fields.name: entity_id

fields.name: retained_earnings_axis
fields.title: Retained Earnings [Axis]
fields.description: Typed dimension used to distinguish a set of related facts about retained earnings.

fields.name: appropriated_retained_earnings_contra_primary_account_affected
fields.title: Appropriated Retained Earnings, Contra Primary Account Affected
fields.description: Account number(s) of the primary account(s) that are offset when retained earnings (both current and prior period) are appropriated.

fields.name: order_number
fields.title: Order Number
fields.description: This is used to order a sequenced table.  This field is added to a table to control ordering of the items on the table.  The value must always be an integer. If this is not used, instance fact values in a sequenced table are shown in a random order in rendering.

fields.name: appropriated_retained_earnings_description
fields.title: Appropriated Retained Earnings, Description
fields.description: Description of transactions related to the appropriation retained earnings (current and prior period).

resources.name: retained_earnings_appropriated_118_instant
resources.title: 118 - Schedule - Retained Earnings - Appropriated - instant

fields.name: entity_id
fields.title: Entity Identifier
fields.description: Unique identifier of respondent

fields.description: This account shall include the amount of all (current and prior periods) retained earnings which have been appropriated or set aside for specific purposes. fields.name: appropriations_of_retained_earnings
fields.title: Appropriations of Retained Earnings
fields.description:
This account shall include appropriations of current period retained earnings.

Items
1. Appropriations required under terms of mortgages, orders of courts, contracts, or other agreements.

2. Appropriations required by action of regulatory authorities.

3. Other appropriations made at option of utility for specific purposes.

fields.name: dividends_declared_common_stock
fields.title: Dividends Declared, Common Stock
fields.description:
A. This account shall include amounts declared payable out of current period retained earnings as dividends on actually outstanding common capital stock issued by the utility. 
B. Dividends shall be segregated for each class of common stock as to those payable in cash, stock and other forms. If not payable in cash, the medium of payment shall be described with sufficient detail to identify it.

fields.description: Typed dimension used to distinguish a set of related facts about retained earnings.

fields.name: adjustments_to_retained_earnings_credit
fields.title: Adjustments to Retained Earnings Credit
fields.description:
Nonrecurring adjustment resulting in an increase to retained earnings. Includes, with prior Commission approval, significant nonrecurring transactions accounted for as prior period adjustments, as follows:

(1) Correction of an error in the financial statements of a prior year.

(2) Adjustments that result from realization of income tax benefits of pre-acquisition operating loss carryforwards of purchased subsidiaries.

All other items of profit and loss recognized during a year shall be included in the determination of net income for that year.

fields.name: adjustments_to_retained_earnings_credit_description
fields.title: Adjustments to Retained Earnings Credit - Description
fields.description: Description of nonrecurring adjustments resulting in an increase to retained earnings, as booked in account 439.

fields.name: order_number
fields.title: Order Number
fields.description: This is used to order a sequenced table.  This field is added to a table to control ordering of the items on the table.  The value must always be an integer. If this is not used, instance fact values in a sequenced table are shown in a random order in rendering.

fields.name: adjustments_to_retained_earnings_credit_contra_primary_account_affected
fields.title: Adjustments to Retained Earnings Credit, Contra Primary Account Affected
fields.description: Account number(s) of the primary account(s) (within assets or liabilities) that are offset by increasing nonrecurring adjustments to retained earnings booked in account 439.

resources.title: 120 - Schedule - Statement of Cash Flows - duration

fields.name: entity_id
fields.title: Entity Identifier
fields.description: Unique identifier of respondent

fields.name: filing_name
fields.title: Filing Name
fields.description: Name of filing

fields.name: publication_time
fields.title: Publication Time
fields.description: Time the filing was made available on the FERC RSS feed.

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: Start date of report period

fields.name: end_date
fields.title: End Date
fields.description: End date of report period

fields.name: cash_flows_provided_from_used_in_investment_activities
fields.title: Cash Flows Provided from (Used In) Investment Activities
fields.description: Total of cash flows provided from (used by) investing activities.

fields.name: other_construction_and_acquisition_of_plant_investment_activities
fields.title: Other Construction and Acquisition of Plant, Investment Activities
fields.description: Cash outflows associated with the construction or acquisition of physical assets of the plant.

fields.name: other_retirements_of_balances_impacting_cash_flows_from_financing_activities
fields.title: Other Retirements of Balances Impacting Cash Flows from Financing Activities
fields.description: Cash outflows related to retirements of balances affecting financing activities that are not separately disclosed in the statement of cash flows.

fields.name: gross_additions_to_utility_plant_less_nuclear_fuel_investing_activities
fields.title: Gross Additions to Utility Plant (Less Nuclear Fuel), Investing Activities
fields.description: Current period acquisitions of physical assets, capitalized within the utility plant (which refer to utility plants that render one type of service (i.e. solely provide electric, gas, steam, etc.)), used in the normal conduct of business and not intended for resale. Examples include, but are not limited to, land, buildings, machinery and equipment, office equipment, furniture and fixtures, and computer equipment. Acquisitions should exclude purchases of nuclear fuels that are capitalized within the utility plant.

fields.name: disposition_of_investments_in_and_advances_to_associated_and_subsidiary_companies
fields.title: Disposition of Investments in (And Advances To) Associated and Subsidiary Companies
fields.description: Cash proceeds from the sale (or disposal) of investments in associated entities (entities where the business but does not retain control) or subsidiaries (entities where the business retains control).

fields.name: net_increase_in_short_term_debt
fields.title: Net Increase in Short-Term Debt
fields.description: Current period increase in short term debt (debt that matures within 12 months).

fields.name: allowance_for_other_funds_used_during_construction_operating_activities
fields.title: Allowance for Other Funds Used During Construction, Operating Activities
fields.description: Current period change in the allowance for other funds used during construction classified as operating activity. The allowance for funds used during construction represents the estimated costs of debt and equity financings necessary to finance the construction of physical assets.

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_receivables_operating_activities
fields.title: Net (Increase) Decrease in Receivables, Operating Activities
fields.description: Current period increase (decrease) in amounts due from customers for sale of goods or services.

fields.name: proceeds_from_disposal_of_noncurrent_assets
fields.title: Proceeds from Disposal of Noncurrent Assets
fields.description: Cash proceeds from the sale (or disposal) of long term assets, that are not capitalized within the plant accounts. Example of other long term assets include but are not limited to: intangible assets (customer lists, software, etc.), deferred charges, deferred taxes etc.

fields.name: proceeds_from_issuance_of_preferred_stock_financing_activities
fields.title: Proceeds from Issuance of Preferred Stock, Financing Activities
fields.description: Cash proceeds (inflows) from issuance of preferred stock.

fields.name: investment_tax_credit_adjustments_net
fields.title: Investment Tax Credit Adjustments (Net)
fields.description: Current period changes in taxes credits, consisting of reductions in taxes owed as a result of meeting certain tax policy obligation, to be received in the future.

fields.name: undistributed_earnings_from_subsidiary_companies_operating_activities
fields.title: Undistributed Earnings from Subsidiary Companies, Operating Activities
fields.description: Current period change in undistributed earnings attributed to subsidiary companies, to reconcile net income to cash provided (used in) operating activities.

fields.name: allowance_for_other_funds_used_during_construction_investing_activities
fields.title: Allowance for Other Funds Used During Construction, Investing Activities
fields.description: Current period change in the allowance for other funds used during construction classified as investing activity. The allowance for funds used during construction represents the estimated costs of debt and equity financings necessary to finance the construction of physical assets.

fields.name: cash_provided_by_outside_sources
fields.title: Cash Provided by Outside Sources
fields.description: Amount of cash inflow (outflow) generated by outside financing.

fields.name: gross_additions_to_common_utility_plant_investing_activities
fields.title: Gross Additions to Common Utility Plant, Investing Activities
fields.description: Current period acquisitions of physical assets, capitalized within the common utility plants (which refer to utility plants that integrate and render more than one type of service (i.e. provide electricity and steam, or electricity and gas, etc.)), used in the normal conduct of business and not intended for resale. Examples include, but are not limited to, land, buildings, machinery and equipment, office equipment, furniture and fixtures, and computer equipment.

fields.name: dividends_on_preferred_stock
fields.title: Dividends on Preferred Stock
fields.description: Cash payments (outflows) made to pay dividends on preferred stock.

fields.name: proceeds_from_issuance_of_common_stock_financing_activities
fields.title: Proceeds from Issuance of Common Stock, Financing Activities
fields.description: Cash proceeds (inflows) from issuance of common stock.

fields.name: payments_for_retirement_of_preferred_stock_financing_activities
fields.title: Payments for Retirement of Preferred Stock, Financing Activities
fields.description: Cash payments (outflows) made towards retiring (extinguishing) preferred stock.

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_payables_and_accrued_expenses_investing_activities
fields.title: Net Increase (Decrease) in Payables and Accrued Expenses, Investing Activities
fields.description: Current period increase (decrease) in obligations recorded in accounts payable and accrued expenses, classified as investing activities.

fields.name: other_adjustments_to_cash_flows_from_investment_activities
fields.title: Other Adjustments to Cash Flows from Investment Activities
fields.description: Cash or noncash adjustments to reconcile net income to cash provided by (used in) investing activities that are not separately disclosed in the statement of cash flows.

fields.name: other_adjustments_by_outside_sources_to_cash_flows_from_financing_activities
fields.title: Other Adjustments by Outside Sources to Cash Flows from Financing Activities
fields.description: Cash or noncash adjustments to reconcile net income to cash provided by (used in) financing activities, that are provided by outside sources (debt, stock, etc.).

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_allowances_held_for_speculation_investing_activities
fields.title: Net (Increase) Decrease in Allowances Held for Speculation, Investing Activities
fields.description: Current period increase (decrease) in allowance funds held for miscellaneous (speculation) activites, for items classified as investing activities.

fields.name: purchase_of_investment_securities
fields.title: Purchase of Investment Securities
fields.description: Current period acquisitions (cash outflows) of investment securities.

fields.name: payments_for_retirement_of_common_stock_financing_activities
fields.title: Payments for Retirement of Common Stock, Financing Activities
fields.description: Cash payments (outflows) made towards retiring (extinguishing) common stock.

fields.name: cash_flows_provided_from_used_in_financing_activities
fields.title: Cash Flows Provided from (Used In) Financing Activities
fields.description: Total of cash flows provided from (used by) financing activities.

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_receivables_investing_activities
fields.title: Net (Increase) Decrease in Receivables, , Investing Activities
fields.description: Current period increase (decrease) in amounts due from customers for sale of goods or services, for items classified as investing activities.

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_payables_and_accrued_expenses_operating_activities
fields.title: Net Increase (Decrease) in Payables and Accrued Expenses, Operating Activities
fields.description: Current period increase (decrease) in obligations recorded in accounts payable and accrued expenses.

fields.name: loans_made_or_purchased
fields.title: Loans Made or Purchased
fields.description: Cash payments (outflows) related to the issuance of loans or acquisition of loans from third parties.

fields.name: payments_for_retirement_abstract
fields.title: Payments for Retirement [Abstract]
fields.description: ferc:PaymentsForRetirementAbstract

fields.name: deferred_income_taxes_net
fields.title: Deferred Income Taxes (Net)
fields.description: Current period changes in the deferred income tax assets or (liabilities) balances, attributable to taxable temporary differences between taxable and book income, that will be received or (paid) in the future.

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_inventory_investing_activities
fields.title: Net (Increase) Decrease in Inventory, Investing Activities
fields.description: Current period increase (decrease) in available inventory, for items classified as investing activities.

fields.name: payments_for_retirement_of_long_term_debt_financing_activities
fields.title: Payments for Retirement of Long-Term Debt, Financing Activities
fields.description: Cash payments (outflows) made towards retiring (extinguishing) long term debt (debt that matures past 12 months).

fields.name: gross_additions_to_nonutility_plant_investing_activities
fields.title: Gross Additions to Nonutility Plant, Investing Activities
fields.description: Current period acquisitions of physical assets, capitalized within nonutility plants (which refer to facilities that do not generate the services rendered by the utility), used in the normal conduct of business and not intended for resale.

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_cash_and_cash_equivalents_abstract
fields.title: Net Increase (Decrease) in Cash and Cash Equivalents [Abstract]
fields.description: ferc:NetIncreaseDecreaseInCashAndCashEquivalentsAbstract

fields.name: cash_outflows_for_plant
fields.title: Cash Outflows for Plant
fields.description: Amount of cash outflows used in acquiring all physical assets for all plant facilities (both utility and non-utility).

fields.name: depreciation_and_depletion
fields.title: Depreciation and Depletion
fields.description: The current period expense that reflects the allocation of cost of physical assets over their useful lives (depreciation) or available natural resources (depletion) during the ongoing operations of the business.

fields.name: proceeds_from_sales_of_investment_securities
fields.title: Proceeds from Sales of Investment Securities
fields.description: Current period cash proceeds from the sale (or disposal) of investments securities.

fields.name: disposition_of_investments_in_and_advances_to_associated_and_subsidiary_companies_abstract
fields.title: Disposition of Investments in (And Advances To) Associated and Subsidiary Companies [Abstract]
fields.description: Header for Disposition of Investments in (and Advances to) Associated and Subsidiary Companies on the Cash Flow Statement

fields.name: net_cash_flow_from_operating_activities
fields.title: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
fields.description: Net Cash from Operating Activities.

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_other_regulatory_assets_operating_activities
fields.title: Net (Increase) Decrease in Other Regulatory Assets, Operating Activities
fields.description: Current period increase (decrease) in regulatory assets balances.

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_allowances_inventory_operating_activities
fields.title: Net (Increase) Decrease in Allowances Inventory, Operating Activities
fields.description: Current period increase (decrease) in the allowance reserve of inventory. The allowance reserve of inventory consists of valuation or quantity adjustments to inventory.

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_other_regulatory_liabilities_operating_activities
fields.title: Net Increase (Decrease) in Other Regulatory Liabilities, Operating Activities
fields.description: Current period increase (decrease) in regulatory liability balances.

fields.name: net_increase_decrease_in_inventory_operating_activities
fields.title: Net (Increase) Decrease in Inventory, Operating Activities
fields.description: Current period increase (decrease) in available inventory.

fields.name: proceeds_from_issuance_of_long_term_debt_financing_activities
fields.title: Proceeds from Issuance of Long-Term Debt, Financing Activities
fields.description: Cash proceeds (inflows) from issuance of long term debt (debt that matures past 12 months).

fields.name: other_adjustments_to_cash_flows_from_financing_activities
fields.title: Other Adjustments to Cash Flows from Financing Activities
fields.description: Cash or noncash adjustments to reconcile net income to cash provided by (used in) financing activities that are not separately disclosed in the statement of cash flows.

fields.name: gross_additions_to_nuclear_fuel_investing_activities
fields.title: Gross Additions to Nuclear Fuel, Investing Activities
fields.description: Current period purchases of nuclear fuels that are capitalized (held) within the utility plant.

fields.name: dividends_on_common_stock
fields.title: Dividends on Common Stock
fields.description: Cash payments (outflows) made to pay dividends on common stock.

fields.name: net_decrease_in_short_term_debt
fields.title: Net Decrease in Short-Term Debt
fields.description: Current period decrease in short term debt (debt that matures within 12 months).

fields.name: collections_on_loans
fields.title: Collections on Loans
fields.description: Cash proceeds (inflows) from the collection of outstanding loan receivables.

fields.name: investments_in_and_advances_to_associated_and_subsidiary_companies
fields.title: Investments in and Advances to Associated and Subsidiary Companies
fields.description: Cash outflows associated with the investment in (acquisition of) or advances to an entity that is related but not strictly controlled (associated entity - i.e. equity investments, joint ventures, etc.) by the business, or to an entity that is controlled (consolidated subsidiary) by the business.

fields.name: acquisition_of_other_noncurrent_assets
fields.title: Acquisition of Other Noncurrent Assets
fields.description: Current period acquisitions of long term assets, that are not capitalized within the plant accounts. Example of other long term assets include but are not limited to: intangible assets (customer lists, software, etc.), deferred charges, deferred taxes etc.

fields.name: contributions_and_advances_from_associated_and_subsidiary_companies
fields.title: Contributions and Advances from Associated and Subsidiary Companies
fields.description: Cash inflows associated with distributions or advances from associated entities (entities that the business has invested in (i.e. equity investments, joint ventures, etc.) where it does not retain control) or subsidiaries (entities that the business has invested in and retains control).

fields.name: other_adjustments_to_cash_flows_from_operating_activities
fields.title: Other Adjustments to Cash Flows from Operating Activities
fields.description: Other cash or noncash adjustments to reconcile net income to cash provided by (used in) operating activities that are not separately disclosed in the statement of cash flows (i.e. cash received or cash paid for miscellaneous operating activities, net change in other assets or other liabilities, etc.)

fields.name: net_income_loss
fields.title: Net Income (Loss)
fields.description: The total amount of profit or loss for the reporting period, including extraordinary items, net of taxes.

fields.name: noncash_adjustments_to_cash_flows_from_operating_activities
fields.title: Noncash Adjustments to Cash Flows from Operating Activities
fields.description: Current period noncash adjustments to reconcile net income to cash provided by (used in) operating activities, that need to be disclosed separately in the statement of cash flows (i.e. amortization of intangible assets, deferral of income taxes, etc.).

fields.name: entity_id

fields.name: filing_name

fields.description: Name of filing

fields.name: publication_time
fields.title: Publication Time

fields.name: start_date
fields.title: Start Date
fields.description: Start date of report period

fields.name: end_date
fields.title: End Date
fields.description: End date of report period

fields.name: disclosure_of_significant_contingent_assets_or_liabilities_text_block
fields.title: Disclosure of Significant Contingent Assets or Liabilities [Text Block]
fields.description: Disclosure of any significant contingent assets or liabilities existing at the end of the period, including explanation of any action initiated by the Internal Revenue Service involving possible assessment of additional income taxes of material amount, or of a claim for refund of income taxes of a material amount initiated by the utility. Also includes explanation of any dividends in arrears on cumulative preferred stock.

fields.name: disclosure_of_subsequent_events_text_block
fields.title: Disclosure of Subsequent Events [Text Block]
fields.description: Disclosure of events or transactions occurring subsequent to the end of the reporting period which have a material effect. Examples include: accounting principles and practices; estimates inherent in the preparation of the financial statements; status of long-term contracts; capitalization including significant new borrowings or modifications of existing financing agreements; and changes resulting from business combinations or dispositions. Disclosure of material contingencies are included even though a significant change since the period end may not have occurred.

fields.name: disclosure_of_applicable_notes_text_block
fields.title: Disclosure of Applicable Notes [Text Block]
fields.description: If the notes to the financial statements relating to the respondent appearing in the annual report to the stockholders are applicable and furnish the data required by the above instructions, such notes may be included herein.

fields.name: disclosure_of_important_disclosures_regarding_the_financial_statements_text_block
fields.title: Disclosure of Important Disclosures Regarding Financial Statements [Text Block]
fields.description: Disclosure of important notes regarding the Face Financial Statements, or any account thereof.

fields.name: disclosure_of_interim_disclosure_text_block
fields.title: Disclosure of Interim Disclosure [Text Block]
fields.description: For the 3Q disclosures, respondent must provide in the notes sufficient disclosures so as to make the interim information not misleading. Disclosures which would substantially duplicate the disclosures contained in the most recent FERC Annual Report may be omitted.

fields.name: disclosure_of_amounts_related_to_utility_plant_adjustments_text_block
fields.title: Disclosure of Retained Earnings Restrictions [Text Block]
fields.description: Disclosure of any retained earnings restrictions. Includes information on amounts of retained earnings affected by such restrictions.

fields.name: disclosure_of_rate_treatment_where_unamortized_loss_on_reacquired_debt_and_unamortized_gain_on_reacquired_debt_accounts_are_not_used_text_block
fields.title: Disclosure of Rate Treatment Where Unamortized Loss on Reacquired Debt and Unamortized Gain on Reacquired Debt Accounts Are Not Used [Text Block]
fields.description: Disclosure of rate treatment where Accounts 189, Unamortized Loss on Reacquired Debt, and 257, Unamortized Gain on Reacquired Debt, are not used.

fields.name: disclosure_of_retained_earnings_restrictions_text_block
fields.title: Disclosure of Retained Earnings Restrictions [Text Block]
fields.description: Disclosure of any retained earnings restrictions. Includes information on amounts of retained earnings affected by such restrictions.

fields.name: utility_plant_held_for_future_use
fields.title: Utility Plant, Held for Future Use
fields.description: Amount of utility plant (except land and land rights) owned and held for future use in service under a definite plan for such use, to include: (1) Property acquired (except land and land rights) but never used by the utility in service, but held for such service in the future under a definite plan, and (2) property (except land and land rights) previously used by the utility in service, but retired from such service and held pending its reuse in the future, under a definite plan, in service.

fields.name: construction_work_in_progress
fields.title: Construction Work in Progress
fields.description:
A. This account shall include the total of the balances of work orders for electric plant in process of construction.

B. Work orders shall be cleared from this account as soon as practicable after completion of the job. Further, if a project, such as a hydroelectric project, a steam station or a transmission line, is designed to consist of two or more units or circuits which may be placed in service at different dates, any expenditures which are common to and which will be used in the operation of the project as a whole shall be included in electric plant in service upon the completion and the readiness for service of the first unit. Any expenditures which are identified exclusively with units of property not yet in service shall be included in this account.

C. Expenditures on research, development, and demonstration projects for construction of utility facilities are to be included in a separate subdivision in this account. Records must be maintained to show separately each project along with complete detail of the nature and purpose of the research, development, and demonstration project together with the related costs.

fields.name: depreciation_amortization_and_depletion_utility_plant_in_service

fields.description: Total amount of depreciation, amortization, and depletion for utility plant in service.

fields.title: Amortization and Depletion, Utility Plant Leased to Others
fields.description: Amount of accumulated amortization and depletion of utility plant leased to others.

fields.name: depreciation_utility_plant_in_service
fields.title: Depreciation, Utility Plant in Service

fields.name: amortization_of_underground_storage_land_and_land_rightsutility_plant_in_service

fields.name: amortization_of_plant_acquisition_adjustment
fields.title: Amortization of Plant Acquisition Adjustment
fields.description: Amount of accumulated provision for amortization of utility plant acquisition adjustments for the purpose of providing for the extinguishment of acquisition adjustments in instances where the amortization is not made by direct write-off.

fields.title: Utility Plant in Service, Classified and Unclassified
fields.description: Total classified and unclassified amount of utility plant in service.

fields.name: abandonment_of_leases

fields.description: Amount of provision for abandonment of natural gas leases.

fields.name: amortization_utility_plant_held_for_future_use

fields.title: Utility Plant in Service, Completed Construction Not Classified
fields.description: Amount of the balances of work orders for utility plant which has been completed and placed in service but which work orders have not been classified for transfer to the detailed utility plant accounts.

fields.title: Utility Plant, Leased to Others
fields.description: Amount of utility plant owned by the utility, but leased to others as operating units or systems, where the lessee has exclusive possession.

fields.name: utility_plant_in_service_plant_purchased_or_sold
fields.title: Utility Plant in Service, Plant Purchased or Sold
fields.description: Amount of plant acquired as an operating unit or system by purchase, merger, consolidation liquidation, or otherwise.

fields.name: accumulated_provision_for_depreciation_amortization_and_depletion_of_plant_utility
fields.title: Accumulated Provision for Depreciation, Amortization, and Depletion of Plant Utility
fields.description: Amount as of the end of the reporting period of accumulated provision for depreciation, amortization, and depletion of utility plant property, plant, and equipment.

fields.name: depreciation_utility_plant_leased_to_others
fields.title: Depreciation, Utility Plant Leased to Others
fields.description: Amount of accumulated depreciation on utility plant leased to others.

fields.name: depreciation_utility_plant_held_for_future_use
fields.title: Depreciation, Utility Plant Held for Future Use
fields.description: Amount of accumulated depreciation of utility plant held for future use.

fields.name: utility_plant_in_service_property_under_capital_leases

fields.description: Amount of plant leased from others and used by the utility in its utility operations.

fields.name: utility_plant_acquisition_adjustment
fields.title: Utility Plant, Acquisition Adjustment
fields.description: Amount of the difference between (1) the cost of the accounting utility of utility plant acquired as an operating unit or system by purchase, merger, consolidation, liquidation, or otherwise, and (2) the original cost, estimated, if not known, of such property, less the amount or amounts credited by the accounting utility at the time of acquisition to accumulated provisions for depreciation and amortization and contributions in aid of construction with respect to such property.

fields.name: utility_plant_net
fields.title: Utility Plant, Net
fields.description: Total net amount of utility plant property, plant, and equipment after accumulated provision for depreciation, amortization, and depletion.

fields.name: utility_plant_in_service_experimental_plant_unclassified
fields.title: Utility Plant in Service, Experimental Plant Unclassified
fields.description: Amount of utility plant which was constructed as a research, development, and demonstration plant, and due to the nature of the plant, it is desirous to operate it for a period of time in an experimental status.

fields.name: utility_plant_in_service_classified
fields.title: Utility Plant in Service, Classified
fields.description: Amount of utility plant owned and used by the utility in its operations, and having expectation of life in service of more than one year from date of installation, including such property owned by the utility but held by nominees.

fields.name: depreciation_and_amortization_utility_plant_held_for_future_use

fields.description: Amount as of the end of the reporting period of depreciation and amortization of utility plant held for future use.

fields.name: depreciation_amortization_and_depletion_utility_plant_leased_to_others
fields.title: Depreciation, Amortization and Depletion, Utility Plant Leased to Others
fields.description: Amount as of the end of the reporting period of accumulated depreciation, amortization, and depletion of utility plant leased to others.

fields.name: spent_nuclear_fuel
fields.title: Spent Nuclear Fuel
fields.description:
A. This account shall include the original cost of nuclear fuel assemblies, in the process of cooling, transferred from account 120.3, Nuclear Fuel Assemblies in Reactor, upon removal from a reactor pending reprocessing.

B. This account shall be credited and account 120.5, Accumulated Provision for Amortization of Nuclear Fuel Assemblies, debited for fuel assemblies, after the cooling period is over, at the cost recorded in this account.

fields.name: nuclear_materials_held_for_sale_other
fields.title: Nuclear Materials Held for Sale, Other

fields.name: fabrication_costs_nuclear_fuel_in_process_of_refinement_conversion_enrichment_and_fabrication
fields.title: Fabrication Costs, Nuclear Fuel in Process of Refinement, Conversion, Enrichment, and Fabrication
fields.description: Amount as of the report date of nuclear fuel in process of fabrication.

fields.name: estimated_net_salvage_value_of_nuclear_materials_nuclear_fuel_assemblies_in_reactor
fields.title: Estimated Net Salvage Value of Nuclear Materials, Nuclear Fuel Assemblies in Reactor
fields.description: The amount of estimated net salvage value of nuclear materials in reactor.

fields.name: accumulated_provision_for_amortization_of_nuclear_fuel_assemblies
fields.title: Accumulated Provision for Amortization of Nuclear Fuel Assemblies (Major Only)
fields.description:
A. This account shall be credited and account 518, Nuclear fuel expense shall be debited for the amortization of the net cost of nuclear fuel assemblies used in the production of energy. The net cost of nuclear fuel assemblies subject to amortization shall be the original cost of nuclear fuel assemblies, plus or less the expected net salvage value of uranium, plutonium, and other by-products.

B. This account shall be credited with the net salvage value of uranium, plutonium, and other nuclear by-products when such items are sold, transferred or otherwise disposed of. Account 120.1, Nuclear Fuel in Process of Refinement, Conversion, Enrichment, and Fabrication, shall be debited with the net salvage value of nuclear materials to be reprocessed. Account 157, Nuclear Materials Held for Sale shall be debited for the net salvage value of nuclear materials not to be reprocessed but to be sold or otherwise disposed of and account 120.2, will be debited with the net salvage value of nuclear materials that will be held for future use and not actually in process, in account 120.1, Nuclear Fuel in Process of Refinement, Conversion, Enrichment, and Fabrication.

C. This account shall be debited and account 120.4, Spent Nuclear Fuel, shall be credited with the cost of fuel assemblies at the end of the cooling period.

fields.name: other_overhead_construction_costs_nuclear_fuel_in_process_of_refinement_conversion_enrichment_and_fabrication
fields.title: Other Overhead Construction Costs, Nuclear Fuel in Process of Refinement, Conversion, Enrichment, and Fabrication
fields.description: Amount of other overhead constructions costs as of the report date applied to the cost of nuclear fuel.

fields.name: allowance_for_funds_construction_nuclear_fuel_in_process_of_refinement_conversion_enrichment_and_fabrication
fields.title: Allowance for Funds, Construction, Nuclear Fuel in Process of Refinement, Conversion, Enrichment, and Fabrication
fields.description: The amount of allowance for funds used during construction applied to the cost of nuclear fuel.

fields.name: nuclear_materials_held_for_sale
fields.title: Nuclear Materials Held for Sale (Major Only)
fields.description: This account shall include the net salvage value of uranium, plutonium and other nuclear materials held by the company for sale or other disposition and that are not to be reused by the company in its electric utility operations. This account shall be debited and account 120.5, Accumulated Provision for Amortization of Nuclear Fuel Assemblies, credited for such net salvage value. Any difference between the amount recorded in this account and the actual amount realized from the sale of materials shall be debited or credited, as appropriate, to account 518, Nuclear Fuel Expense at the time of such sale.

fields.name: estimated_net_salvage_value_of_nuclear_fuel_materials_spent_nuclear_fuel
fields.title: Estimated Net Salvage Value of Nuclear Fuel Materials, Spent Nuclear Fuel
fields.description: The amount of estimated net salvage value of spent nuclear fuel.

fields.name: nuclear_materials_held_for_sale_plutonium
fields.title: Nuclear Materials Held for Sale, Plutonium
fields.description: The net salvage value of plutonium held by the company for sale or other disposition and that is not to be reused by the company in its electric utility operations.

fields.name: nuclear_fuel_materials_and_assemblies
fields.title: Nuclear Fuel Materials and Assemblies
fields.description: The total amount of nuclear fuel materials and assemblies in stock and in reactor.

fields.name: nuclear_fuel_in_process_of_refinement_conversion_enrichment_and_fabrication
fields.title: Nuclear Fuel in Process of Refinement, Conversion, Enrichment and Fabrication (Major Only)
fields.description:
A. This account shall include the original cost to the utility of nuclear fuel materials while in process of refinement, conversion, enrichment, and fabrication into nuclear fuel assemblies and components, including processing, fabrication, and necessary shipping costs. This account shall also include the salvage value of nuclear materials which are actually being reprocessed for use and were transferred from account 120.5, Accumulated Provision for Amortization of Nuclear Fuel Assemblies. (See definition 20.)

B. This account shall be credited and account 120.2, Nuclear Fuel Materials and Assemblies—Stock Account, shall be debited for the cost of completed fuel assemblies delivered for use in refueling or to be held as spares. In the case of the initial core loading, the transfer shall be made directly to account 120.3, Nuclear Fuel Assemblies in Reactor, upon the conclusion of the experimental or test period of the plant prior to its becoming available for service.

items
1. Cost of natural uranium, uranium ores concentrates or other nuclear fuel sources, such as thorium, plutonium, and U-233.

2. Value of recovered nuclear materials being reprocessed for use.

3. Milling process costs.

4. Sampling and weighing, and assaying costs.

5. Purification and conversion process costs.

6. Costs of enrichment by gaseous diffusion or other methods.

7. Costs of fabrication into fuel forms suitable for insertion in the reactor.

8. All shipping costs of materials and components, including shipping of fabricated fuel assemblies to the reactor site.

9. Use charges on leased nuclear materials while in process of refinement, conversion, enrichment, and fabrication.

fields.name: nuclear_materials_nuclear_fuel_in_process_of_refinement_conversion_enrichment_and_fabrication
fields.title: Nuclear Materials, Nuclear Fuel in Process of Refinement, Conversion, Enrichment, and Fabrication
fields.description: Amount as of the report date of natural uranium, uranium ores concentrates or other nuclear fuel sources, such as thorium, plutonium, and U-233. Includes value of recovered nuclear materials being reprocessed for use.

fields.name: nuclear_fuel_under_capital_leases
fields.title: Nuclear Fuel under Capital Leases (Major Only)
fields.description:
A. This account shall include the amount recorded under capital leases for nuclear fuel leased from others for use by the utility in its utility operations.

B. Records shall be maintained with respect to each capital lease reflecting: (1) Name of lessor, (2) basic details of lease, (3) terminal date, (4) original cost or fair market value of nuclear fuel leased, (5) future minimum lease payments, (6) executory costs, (7) present value of minimum lease payments, (8) the amount representing interest and the interest rate used, and (9) expenses paid.

fields.name: nuclear_materials_held_for_sale_uranium
fields.title: Nuclear Materials Held for Sale, Uranium
fields.description: The net salvage value of uranium held by the company for sale or other disposition and that is not to be reused by the company in its electric utility operations.

fields.name: estimated_net_salvage_value_of_nuclear_materials_in_chemical_processing
fields.title: Estimated Net Salvage Value of Nuclear Materials in Chemical Processing
fields.description: The amount of estimated net salvage value of nuclear materials in chemical processing.

fields.name: nuclear_fuel_assemblies_in_reactor
fields.title: Nuclear Fuel Assemblies in Reactor
fields.description:
A. This account shall include the cost of nuclear fuel assemblies when inserted in a reactor for the production of electricity. The amounts included herein shall be transferred from account 120.2, Nuclear Fuel Materials and Assemblies—Stock Account, except for the initial core loading which will be transferred directly from account 120.1.

B. Upon removal of fuel assemblies from a reactor, the original cost of the assemblies removed shall be transferred to account 120.4, Spent Nuclear Fuel or account 120.2, Nuclear Fuel Materials and Assemblies—Stock Account, as appropriate.

fields.name: nuclear_fuel_materials_and_assemblies_in_stock
fields.title: Nuclear Fuel Materials and Assemblies in Stock
fields.description:
A. This account shall be debited and account 120.1, Nuclear Fuel in Process of Refinement, Conversion, Enrichment, and Fabrication, shall be credited with the cost of fabricated fuel assemblies delivered for use in refueling or to be carried in stock as spares. It shall also include the original cost of fabricated fuel assemblies purchased in completed form. This account shall also include the original cost of partially irradiated fuel assemblies being held in stock for reinsertion in a reactor which had been transferred from account 120.3, Nuclear Fuel Assemblies in Reactor.

B. When fuel assemblies included in this account are inserted in a reactor, this account shall be credited and account 120.3, Nuclear Fuel Assemblies in Reactor, debited for the cost of such assemblies.

C. This account shall also include the cost of nuclear materials and byproduct materials being held for future use and not actually in process in account 120.1, Nuclear Fuel in Process of Refinement, Conversion, Enrichment, and Fabrication.

fields.name: computer_software_regional_transmission_and_market_operation_plant
fields.title: Computer Software, Regional Transmission and Market Operation Plant
fields.description:
This account shall include the cost of off-the-shelf and in-house developed software purchased and used to provide scheduling, system control and dispatching, system planning, standards development, market monitoring, and market administration activities. Records shall be maintained identifying to the maximum extent practicable the cost of software used for:

(1) Scheduling, system control and dispatching,

(2) System planning and standards development, and

(3) Market monitoring and market administration activities.

Items
1. Software licenses

2. User interface software

3. Modeling software

4. Database software

5. Tracking and monitoring software

6. Energy Management System (EMS) software

7. Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) system software

8. Evaluation and assessment system software

9. Operating, planning and transaction scheduling software

10. Reliability applications

11. Market application software.

fields.name: turbogenerator_units_nuclear_production
fields.title: Turbogenerator Units, Nuclear Production
fields.description:
This account shall include the cost installed of main turbine-driven units and accessory equipment used in generating electricity by steam.

Items
1. Air cleaning and cooling apparatus, including blowers, drive equipment, air ducts not a part of building, louvers, pumps, hoods, etc.

2. Circulating pumps, including connections between condensers, and intake and discharge tunnels.

3. Condensers, including condensate pumps, air and vacuum pumps ejectors, unloading valves and vacuum breakers, expansion devices, screens, etc.

4. Generator hydrogen gas piping system and hydrogen detrainment equipment, and bulk hydrogen gas storage equipment.

5. Cooling system, including towers, pumps, tanks and piping.

6. Cranes, hoists, etc., including items wholly identified with items listed herein.

7. Excitation system, when identified with main generating units.

8. Fire extinguishing systems.

9. Foundations and settings, especially constructed for and not expected to outlast the apparatus for which provided.

10. Governors.

11. Lighting systems.

12. Lubricating systems, including gauges filters, water separators, tanks, pumps, piping motors, etc.

13. Mechanical meters, including gauges recording instruments, sampling and testing equipment.

14. Piping—main exhaust, including connections between turbogenerator and condenser and between condenser and hotwell.

15. Piping—main steam, including connections from main throttle valve to turbine inlet.

16. Platforms, railings, steps, gratings, etc. appurtenant to apparatus listed herein.

17. Pressure oil systems, including accumulators, pumps, piping, motors, etc.

18. Steelwork, specially constructed for apparatus listed herein.

19. Throttle and inlet valve.

20. Tunnels, intake and discharge, for condenser system, when not a part of structure water screens, etc.

21. Turbogenerators—main, including turbine and generator, field rheostats and electric connections for self-excited units.

22. Water screens, motors, etc.

23 Moisture separators for turbine steam.

24. Turbine lubricating oil (initial charge).

fields.name: land_and_land_rights_hydraulic_production
fields.title: Land and Land Rights, Hydraulic Production
fields.description: This account shall include the cost of land and land rights used in connection with hydraulic power generation. (See electric plant instruction 7.) For Major utilities, it shall also include the cost of land and land rights used in connection with (1) the conservation of fish and wildlife, and (2) recreation. Separate subaccounts shall be maintained for each of the above.

fields.name: hydraulic_production_plant
fields.title: Hydraulic Production Plant
fields.description: The total cost in connection with hydraulic production plant.

fields.name: energy_storage_equipment_other_production
fields.title: Energy Storage Equipment, Other Production
fields.description:
A. This account shall include the cost installed of energy storage equipment used to store energy for load managing purposes. Where energy storage equipment can perform more than one function or purpose, the cost of the equipment shall be allocated among production, transmission, and distribution plant based on the services provided by the asset and the allocation of the asset's cost through rates approved by a relevant regulatory agency. Reallocation of the cost of equipment recorded in this account shall be in accordance with Electric Plant Instruction No. 12, Transfers of Property.

B. Labor costs and power purchased to energize the equipment are includible on the first installation only. The cost of removing, relocating and resetting energy storage equipment shall not be charged to this account but to accounts Account 548.1, Operation of Energy Storage Equipment, and Account 553.1, Maintenance of Energy Storage Equipment., as appropriate.

C. The records supporting this account shall show, by months, the function(s) each energy storage asset supports or performs.

Items
1. Batteries/Chemical

2. Compressed Air

3. Flywheels

4. Superconducting Magnetic Storage

5. Thermal

Note: The cost of pumped storage hydroelectric plant shall be charged to hydraulic production plant. These are examples of items includible in this account. This list is not exhaustive.

fields.name: prime_movers_other_production
fields.title: Prime Movers, Other Production
fields.description:
This account shall include the cost installed of Diesel or other prime movers devoted to the generation of electric energy, together with their auxiliaries.

Items
1. Air-filtering system.

2. Belting, shafting, pulleys, reduction gearing, etc.

3. Cooling system, including towers, pumps, tanks, and piping.

4. Cranes, hoists, etc., including items wholly identified with apparatus listed herein.

5. Engines, Diesel, gasoline, gas, or other internal combustion.

6. Foundations and settings specially constructed for and not expected to outlast the apparatus for which provided.

7. Governors.

8. Ignition system.

9. Inlet valve.

10. Lighting systems.

11. Lubricating systems, including filters, tanks, pumps, and piping.

12. Mechanical meters, including gauges, recording instruments, sampling, and testing equipment.

13. Mufflers.

14. Piping.

15. Starting systems, compressed air, or other, including compressors and drives, tanks, piping, motors, boards and connections, storage tanks, etc.

16. Steelwork, specially constructed for apparatus listed herein.

17. Waste heat boilers, antifluctuators, etc.

fields.name: street_lighting_and_signal_systems_distribution_plant
fields.title: Street Lighting and Signal Systems, Distribution Plant
fields.description:
This account shall include the cost installed of equipment used wholly for public street and highway lighting or traffic, fire alarm, police, and other signal systems.

Items
1. Armored conductors, buried or submarine, including insulators, insulating materials, splices, trenching, etc.

2. Automatic control equipment.

3. Conductors, overhead or underground, including lead or fabric covered, parkway cables, etc., including splices, insulators, etc.

4. Lamps, are, incandescent, or other types, including glassware, suspension fixtures, brackets, etc.

5. Municipal inspection.

6. Ornamental lamp posts.

7. Pavement disturbed, including cutting and replacing pavement, pavement base, and sidewalks.

8. Permits.

9. Posts and standards.


10. Protection of street openings.

11. Relays or time clocks.

12. Series contactors.

13. Switches.

14. Transformers, pole or underground.

fields.name: energy_storage_equipment_transmission_plant
fields.title: Energy Storage Equipment, Transmission Plant
fields.description:
A. This account shall include the cost installed of energy storage equipment used to store energy for load managing purposes. Where energy storage equipment can perform more than one function or purposes, the cost of the equipment shall be allocated among production, transmission, and distribution plant based on the services provided by the asset and the allocation of the asset's cost through rates approved by a relevant regulatory agency. Reallocation of the cost of equipment recorded in this account shall be in accordance with Electric Plant Instruction No. 12, Transfers of Property.

B. Labor costs and power purchased to energize the equipment are includible on the first installation only. The cost of removing, relocating and resetting energy storage equipment shall not be charged to this account but to Account 562.1, Operation of Energy Storage Equipment, and Account, 570.1, Maintenance of Energy Storage Equipment, as appropriate.

C. The records supporting this account shall show, by months, the function(s) each energy storage asset supports or performs.

fields.name: station_equipment_distribution_plant
fields.title: Station Equipment, Distribution Plant
fields.description:
This account shall include the cost installed of station equipment, including transformer banks, etc., which are used for the purpose of changing the characteristics of electricity in connection with its distribution.

Items
1. Bus compartments, concrete, brick and sectional steel, including items permanently attached thereto.

2. Conduit, including concrete and iron duct runs not part of building.

3. Control equipment, including batteries, battery charging equipment, transformers, remote relay boards, and connections.

4. Conversion equipment, indoor and outdoor, frequency changers, motor generator sets, rectifiers, synchronous converters, motors, cooling equipment, and associated connections.

5. Fences.

6. Fixed and synchronous condensers, including transformers, switching equipment, blowers, motors, and connections.

7. Foundations and settings, specially constructed for and not expected to outlast the apparatus for which provided.

8. General station equipment, including air compressors, motors, hoists, cranes, test equipment, ventilating equipment, etc.

9. Platforms, railings, steps, gratings, etc., appurtenant to apparatus listed herein.

10. Primary and secondary voltage connections, including bus runs and supports, insulators, potheads, lightning arresters, cable and wire runs from and to outdoor connections or to manholes and the associated regulators, reactors, resistors, surge arresters, and accessory equipment.

11. Switchboards, including meters, relays, control wiring, etc.

12. Switching equipment, indoor and outdoor, including oil circuit breakers and operating mechanisms, truck switches, disconnect switches.

Note: The cost of rectifiers, series transformers, and other special station equipment devoted exclusively to street lighting service shall not be included in this account, but in account 373, Street Lighting and Signal Systems.

fields.name: structures_and_improvements_regional_transmission_and_market_operation_plant
fields.title: Structures and Improvements, Regional Transmission and Market Operation Plant
fields.description: This account shall include the cost in place of structures and improvements used for regional transmission and market operations.

fields.name: accessory_electric_equipment_nuclear_production
fields.title: Accessory Electric Equipment, Nuclear Production
fields.description:
This account shall include the cost installed of auxiliary generating apparatus, conversion equipment, and equipment used primarily in connection with the control and switching of electric energy produced by nuclear power, and the protection of electric circuits and equipment, except electric motors used to drive equipment included in other accounts. Such motors shall be included in the account in which the equipment with which they are associated is included.

Note: Do not include in this account transformers and other equipment used for changing the voltage or frequency of electric energy for the purpose of transmission or distribution.

Items
1. Auxiliary generators, including boards, compartments, switching equipment, control equipment, and connections to auxiliary power bus.

2. Excitation system, including motor, turbine and dual-drive exciter sets and rheostats, storage batteries and charging equipment, circuit breakers, panels and accessories, knife switches and accessories, surge arresters, instrument shunts, conductors and conduit, special supports for conduit, generator field and exciter switch panels, exciter bus tie panels, generator and exciter rheostats, etc., special housing, protective screens, etc.

3. Generator main connections, including oil circuit breakers and accessories, disconnecting switches and accessories, operating mechanisms and interlocks, current transformers, potential transformers, protective relays, isolated panels and equipment, conductors and conduit, special supports for generator main leads, grounding switch, etc., special housings, protective screens, etc.

4. Station buses, including main, auxiliary, transfer, synchronizing and fault ground buses, including oil circuit breakers and accessories, disconnecting switches and accessories, operating mechanisms and interlocks, reactors and accessories, voltage regulators and accessories, compensators, resistors, starting transformers, current transformers, potential transformers, protective relays, storage batteries and charging equipment, isolated panels and equipment, conductors and conduit, special supports, special housings, concrete pads, general station grounding system, fire-extinguishing system, and test equipment.

5. Station control system, including station switchboards with panel wiring, panels with instruments and control equipment only, panels with switching equipment mounted or mechanically connected, truck-type boards complete, cubicles, station supervisory control boards, generator and exciter signal stands, temperature recording devices, frequency-control equipment, master clocks, watt-hour meters and synchronoscope in the turbine room, station totalizing wattmeter, boiler-room load indicator equipment, storage batteries, panels and charging sets, instrument transformers for supervisory metering, conductors and conduit, special supports for conduit, switchboards, batteries, special housing for batteries, protective screens, doors, etc.

Note: When any item of equipment listed herein is used wholly to furnish power to equipment included in another account, its cost shall be included in such other account.

fields.name: electric_plant_in_service
fields.title: Electric Plant in Service
fields.description:
A. This account shall include the original cost of electric plant, included in accounts 301 to 399, prescribed herein, owned and used by the utility in its electric utility operations, and having an expectation of life in service of more than one year from date of installation, including such property owned by the utility but held by nominees. (See also account 106 for unclassified construction costs of completed plant actually in service.)

B. The cost of additions to and betterments of property leased from others, which are includible in this account, shall be recorded in subdivisions separate and distinct from those relating to owned property. (See electric plant instruction 6.)

fields.name: tools_shop_and_garage_equipment
fields.title: Tools, Shop and Garage Equipment
fields.description:
This account shall include the cost of tools, implements, and equipment used in construction, repair work, general shops and garages and not specifically provided for or includible in other accounts.

4. Battery charging equipment. 
5. Belts, shafts and countershafts. 
6. Boilers. 
7. Cable pulling equipment. 
8. Concrete mixers. 
9. Drill presses. 
10. Derricks. 
11. Electric equipment. 
12. Engines.

14. Furnaces. 
15. Foundations and settings specially constructed for and not expected to outlast the equipment for which provided. 
16. Gas producers. 
17. Gasoline pumps, oil pumps and storage tanks. 
18. Greasing tools and equipment. 
19. Hoists. 
20. Ladders. 
21. Lathes. 
22. Machine tools. 
23. Motor-driven tools. 
24. Motors.

26. Pneumatic tools.

28. Riveters. 
29. Smithing equipment. 
30. Tool racks. 
31. Vises. 
32. Welding apparatus. 
33. Work benches.

fields.name: station_equipment_transmission_plant
fields.title: Station Equipment, Transmission Plant
fields.description:
This account shall include the cost installed of transforming, conversion, and switching equipment used for the purpose of changing the characteristics of electricity in connection with its transmission or for controlling transmission circuits.

Items
1. Bus compartments, concrete, brick, and sectional steel, including items permanently attached thereto.

2. Conduit, including concrete and iron duct runs not a part of a building.

3. Control equipment, including batteries battery charging equipment, transformers, remote relay boards, and connections.

4. Conversion equipment, including transformers, indoor and outdoor, frequency changers, motor generator sets, rectifiers, synchronous converters, motors, cooling equipment, and associated connections.

5. Fences.

6. Fixed and synchronous condensers, including transformers, switching equipment blowers, motors and connections.

7. Foundations and settings, specially constructed for and not expected to outlast the apparatus for which provided.


8. General station equipment, including air compressors, motors, hoists, cranes, test equipment, ventilating equipment, etc.

9. Platforms, railings, steps, gratings, etc. appurtenant to apparatus listed herein.

10. Primary and secondary voltage connections, including bus runs and supports, insulators, potheads, lightning arresters, cable and wire runs from and to outdoor connections or to manholes and the associated regulators, reactors, resistors, surge arresters, and accessory equipment.

11. Switchboards, including meters, relays, control wiring, etc.

12. Switching equipment, indoor and outdoor, including oil circuit breakers and operating mechanisms, truck switches, and disconnect switches.

13. Tools and appliances.

fields.name: franchises_and_consents
fields.title: Franchises and Consents
fields.description:
A. This account shall include amounts paid to the federal government, to a state or to a political subdivision thereof in consideration for franchises, consents, water power licenses, or certificates, running in perpetuity or for a specified term of more than one year, together with necessary and reasonable expenses incident to procuring such franchises, consents, water power licenses, or certificates of permission and approval, including expenses of organizing and merging separate corporations, where statutes require, solely for the purpose of acquiring franchises. 
B. If a franchise, consent, water power license or certificate is acquired by assignment, the charge to this account in respect thereof shall not exceed the amount paid therefor by the utility to the assignor, nor shall it exceed the amount paid by the original grantee, plus the expense of acquisition to such grantee. Any excess of the amount actually paid by the utility over the amount above specified shall be charged to account 426.5, Other Deductions. 
C. When any franchise has expired, the book cost thereof shall be credited hereto and charged to account 426.5, Other Deductions, or to account 111, Accumulated Provision for Amortization of Electric Utility Plant (for Nonmajor utilities, account 110, Accumulated Provision for Depreciation and Amortization of Electric Plant), as appropriate. 
D. Records supporting this account shall be kept so as to show separately the book cost of each franchise or consent. 
Note: Annual or other periodic payments under franchises shall not be included herein but in the appropriate operating expense account.

4. Energy Management System (EMS) hardware

5. Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) system hardware

6. Peripheral equipment

7. Networking components.
